[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010110 4
1 01000000 1
2 10100111 5
3 00110100 3
4 01001101 4
5 11111111 a
6 10011010 4
7 01001110 4

01 10 10110111 6
12 21 01111101 6
23 32 11111111 a match 5
34 43 11111111 a match 5
45 54 11011110 6
56 65 01011110 5
67 76 01010110 4 match 0
70 07 11100111 6

13 31 11111111 a match 5
24 42 11011111 7
35 53 11111111 a match 5
46 64 11011110 6
57 75 01001110 4 match 7
60 06 11110111 7
71 17 01110100 4

14 41 10111110 6
25 52 01001111 5

47 74 11011010 5
50 05 11101111 7

72 27 01001101 4 match 4
